name: Ultimate Chicken Hermit
author: concavz
bootlegger: The Hermit can be a Good Townsfolk, a Good Outsider, or an Evil Minion. They have 2 abilities of their given character type.
If the Hermit is a Townsfolk, they think they are the character of an ability that they have. They learn that they are the Hermit when only 3 players are alive.
If the Hermit is a Minion, they must be the only Minion.
If a player tries to use an ability they don't have, treat the ability the player is trying to use as poisoned.
If the Summoner creates a Lil' Monsta, they may choose to make someone a Minion. Then, the Summoner chooses who babysits Lil' Monsta.
The King always learns during the night, even if the living outnumber the dead.
